recommendations.title: Gold Brick
recommendations.overview: Determined to even the scales and profit from his thankless job, a factory worker schemes to traffic luxury perfumes from under his employer's nose.

recommendations.title: Saturday Night and Sunday Morning
recommendations.overview: A 22-year-old factory worker lets loose on the weekends: drinking, brawling, and dating two women, one of whom is older and married.

recommendations.title: Guava Island
recommendations.overview: Deni Maroon, a musician and dock worker is determined to pull off a music festival against the interests of the local factory owner.

recommendations.title: Checkered Ninja
recommendations.overview: A possessed Ninja doll teams up with a teenage boy to avenge the murder of a poor child factory worker.

recommendations.title: Tyler Perry's A Madea Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Madea's back - hallelujer! And she's not putting up with any nonsense as family drama erupts at her great-grandson's college graduation celebration.

recommendations.title: Seven Chances
recommendations.overview: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday -- which is today -- he'll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative.

recommendations.title: Delicacy
recommendations.overview: A French woman mourning over the death of her husband three years prior is courted by a Swedish co-worker.

recommendations.title: The Mustang
recommendations.overview: While participating in a rehabilitation program training wild mustangs, a convict at first struggles to connect with the horses and his fellow inmates, but he learns to confront his violent past as he soothes an especially feisty horse.

recommendations.title: Anora
recommendations.overview: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

recommendations.title: My Piece of the Pie
